real_prompts: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create a project management tool with tasks, projects, and a dashboard. Admins can see analytics.
I need an e-commerce app with products, orders, customers, and a payment system. Admin role for managing inventory.
Build a support ticketing system with tickets, login, and role-based access for agents and admins.
Make a simple blog platform with posts, an admin role, and login/signup.
Build a booking system for appointments with customers, a dashboard, and notifications.
Create an invoicing app for freelancers: invoices, customers, payments, and a dashboard.
Build a CRM with leads, deals, contacts, role-based access, and analytics for managers.
I want a SaaS app with a premium subscription plan, user login, and an admin analytics dashboard.
Build a helpdesk app with tickets, search, file uploads, and chat between agents and customers.

edge_cases.prompt: I want a website for my business
An app with no login but every user must log in to see tickets and assign priority
Free app with no payments but also a premium paywall for advanced features
Public app with no roles, but only admins can edit and only managers can view analytics
